mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listings (seller_id, title, price, make, model, year, mileage, fuel_type, transmission, city, description, status, published_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{sellerId}, #{title}, #{price}, #{make}, #{model}, #{year}, #{mileage}, #{fuelType}, #{transmission}, #{city}, #{description}, #{status}, #{publishedAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE listings SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() , published_at = COALESCE(published_at, NOW()) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM listings WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM listings WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id IN
#{cid}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO listing_photos (listing_id, url, sort_order) VALUES
(#{listingId}, #{url}, #{i})
mapper.select: SELECT url FROM listing_photos WHERE listing_id = #{listingId} ORDER BY sort_order
